concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了13条假设，包括俄罗斯联盟号合同延续、通胀率上限、成本与质量成正比等，为模型建立提供基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1. The plan with Russia to purchase seats on the Soyuz can continue past the ending date of the contract in 2017 and until 2022. ... 13. All spacecraft will have optimal conditions in their window when they launch.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 638,000,000 = 5(51,000,000)+x(27,561), where x represents the cost in USD per pound of payload. A little bit of arithmetic informs us that x ≈ $13,530/lb. of payload

concepts_used.title: 统计基础（均值/方差/正态）
concepts_used.how_used: 计算第三宇航员停留天数的均值，用于调整成本公式：d = (1*9+3*10+...+3*20)/35 ≈ 13.86天。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: From here, we can take the mean of d, ... d = 485/35 ≈13.86

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分清晰陈述问题背景：美国航天飞机退役后，需为国际空间站制定10年维护计划，从NASA视角出发。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In this problem, we were asked to create a plan for maintaining the International Space Station for the next 10 years. Because the final United States Space Shuttle has landed, we need to find transportation from other sources, such as other countries and companies.

concepts_used.title: 公式编号与引用
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中公式未编号，但使用了近似符号和清晰的数学表达式。

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用了表格展示第三宇航员停留天数的频率分布，以及计划任务时间表。
